    Journal metrics
    • 45.1
      Impact Factor
      The Impact Factor measur= es the average number of citations received in a particular year by papers = published in the journal during the two preceding years.
      Journal Citatio= n Reports 2025 (Clarivate Analytics, 2026)
    • 67.8
      C= iteScore
      CiteScore measures the averag= e citations received per peer-reviewed document. CiteScore values are based= on citation counts in a range of four years to peer-reviewed documents pub= lished in the same four calendar years, divided by the number of these docu= ments in these same four years.
      2025 CiteScore =C2=A9 2026 Elsevier B.V.=
    • 10
      Time to first editorial decision
      The median number of days from submission to first decision = (desk accept or send the paper to review or desk reject).
    • 2= 8
      Acceptance to online publication
      For papers published online, the median number of days from accep= tance to first online publication.

    Events & announcements

    Cell Press webinar: Marine microbiology in a changing climate Opens in new window  

    June 23, 2026, 10:00 a.m. ET | available live & on demand

    The Cellular Senescence Network (SenNet) consortium

    This collection aims to comprehensively identify and characterize senescent= cells across the human body, across the lifespan, and across states of hea= lth and disease.

    Cell Press Symposia: Taking programmed cell death from mechanisms to invent= ions Opens in new window  

    October 22=E2=80=9324, 2026 | Hangzhou, China

    Cell Symposia is now Cell Press Symposia

    Explore the story behind the change.

    About

    Cell

    Cell publishes findings of unusual significance in any area of = experimental biology, including but not limited to cell biology, molecular = biology, neuroscience, immunology, virology and microbiology, cancer, human= genetics, systems biology, signaling, and disease mechanisms and therapeut= ics. 

    More=

    This journal offers the option to publish open access

    Authors may choose to publish open access by paying an article publishin= g charge.

    Article publishing charge: $11,400=20
    To provide gold open access, this journal has a pu= blication fee which needs to be met by the authors or their research funder= s for each article published open access

    One Year Ago

    All papers published in Cell more than one year ago are free to= read. Our June 12, issue is now available in our Open Archive!

html { font-family: sans-serif; line-height: 1.25; text-size-adjust: 100%; = } article, aside, footer, header, nav, section { display: block; } h1 { font-size: 2em; margin: 0.67em 0px; } figcaption, figure, main { display: block; } figure { margin: 1em 40px; } hr { box-sizing: content-box; height: 0px; overflow: visible; } pre { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; } a { background-color: transparent; } a:active, a:hover { outline-width: 0px; } abbr[title] { border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-style: none; borde= r-bottom-color: currentcolor; text-decoration: underline dotted; } b, strong { font-weight: bolder; } code, kbd, samp { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; } dfn { font-style: italic; } mark { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } small { font-size: 80%; } sub, sup { font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; vertical-ali= gn: baseline; } sub { bottom: -0.25em; } sup { top: -0.5em; } audio, video { display: inline-block; } audio:not([controls]) { display: none; height: 0px; } img { border-style: none; } svg:not(:root) { overflow: hidden; } button, input, optgroup, select, textarea { + .search__item--multimedia { margin-top: 0px; } .search__item--web { padding: 0px 0px 1.25rem; margin: 0px 0px 1.25rem; col= or: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .search__item__media { text-align: center; } .search__item__media .cloudflare-stream-container, .search__item__media .gi= f, .search__item__media audio, .search__item__media video { max-width: 100%= ; display: block; margin: 0px auto; } @media (min-width: 532px) { .search__item__media .cloudflare-stream-container, .search__item__media .= gif, .search__item__media audio, .search__item__media video { height: 10.68= 75rem; } } @media (min-width: 532px) { .search__item__media .gif .mediaPlayer__player, .search__item__media .gif= __image { height: 100%; width: 100%; } } .search__item__media .cloudflare-stream-container, .search__item__media vid= eo { width: 100%; } @media (min-width: 532px) { .search__item__media .cloudflare-stream-container { overflow: hidden auto= ; } .search__item__media .cloudflare-stream-container stream { width: calc(10= 0% - 0.625rem); margin: 0px auto; } } .search__item__media .mediaPlayer.audio .mediaPlayer__player { margin: 0px;= } .search__item__media .player-wrapper { height: 10.6875rem; display: flex; a= lign-items: flex-end; } .search__item figure { margin: 0px 0px 0.75rem; padding: 0px; border-width:= medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: init= ial; } .search__item .figure-wrapper { height: 10.6875rem; text-align: center; dis= play: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-end; } .search__item .figure-wrapper img { max-width: 100%; max-height: 10.6875rem= ; } .search__item .figure__title { margin-top: 0px; } .search__item__caption, .search__item figcaption { font-size: 1rem; text-al= ign: left; padding: 0.625rem 0px 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0.75rem; border-color= : rgb(235, 235, 235); border-style: solid; border-width: 0.0625rem 0px; } .search__item__caption h2, .search__item figcaption h2 { font-size: inherit= ; } .search__item__caption .meta__label, .search__item figcaption .meta__label = { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0px 0px 0.625rem; } .search__item__caption .figure__caption__body, .search__item figcaption .fi= gure__caption__body { height: 12.75rem; overflow: auto; padding: 0px 0.625r= em 0px 0px; } .search__item--multimedia-audio .search__item__caption .figure__caption__bo= dy, .search__item--multimedia-audio .search__item figcaption .figure__capti= on__body, .search__item--multimedia-video .search__item__caption .figure__c= aption__body, figcaption .figure__caption__body .figure__caption__content p= { margin: 0px 0px 0.5rem; } .search__item__caption p { margin: 0px; } .search__item__meta { font-weight: 700; margin: 0px 0px 1rem; } .search__item__links, .search__item__meta { font-size: 0.75rem; } .search__item__links ul { list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } .search__item__links li { margin: 0px 0px 1em; } .search__item .hlFld-Title, .search__item .single_highlight_class { backgro= und: rgb(255, 249, 169); } .search__item .hlFld-Title:first-child h4 { margin-top: 1.375rem; } @media (max-width: 767px) { .search__item .hlFld-Title:first-child h4 { margin-top: 0px; } } .search__item .toc_and_free_markers { margin: 0px 0px 0.5rem; } .search__item .toc_and_free_markers img { margin: 0px 0.25rem 0px 0px; vert= ical-align: middle; } .search__item .toc_and_free_markers .freeIcon, .search__item .toc_and_free_= markers .freeIcon::after { vertical-align: middle; } .per-page { float: none; text-transform: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; f= ont-weight: 400; } @media (max-width: 1139px) { .per-page { width: 100%; margin: 0px 0px 1.125rem; } } .search-result--articles .per-page { margin: 0px 0px 0px 1.4375rem; } @media (max-width: 1139px) { .search-result--articles .per-page { margin: 0px 0px 1.125rem; } } .per-page ul { display: inline; float: none; margin: 0px 0.625rem; } .per-page ul li:not(:last-child)::after { content: "|"; margin: 0px 0.25rem= ; color: rgb(235, 235, 235); } .per-page a { display: inline; } .per-page a.js--selected { text-decoration: underline; font-weight: 700; } .pagination { font-size: inherit; margin: 0px; } .pagination > span:not(:last-child)::after { content: "|"; margin: 0px 0.62= 5rem; } .pagination__btn--next::after, .pagination__btn--prev::before { color: rgb(= 0, 0, 0); } .free_featured_article { background: rgb(241, 241, 241); } .search-in_table { display: table; width: 100%; } @media (max-width: 1139px) { .search-in_table { display: block; } } .search-in_row { display: table-row; } @media (max-width: 1139px) { .search-in_row { display: block; } } .search-in_left, .search-in_right { display: table-cell; position: relative= ; vertical-align: top; } @media (max-width: 1139px) { .search-in_left, .search-in_right { display: block; } } .search-in_right { width: 17.125rem; padding-left: 0.75rem; } @media (max-width: 1139px) { .search-in_right { width: auto; padding-left: 0px; margin-top: 0.625rem; = } } .search-in_input, .search-in_select { padding: 0px 0px 0px 0.75rem; margin:= 0px; height: 2rem; line-height: 2rem; border: 0.0625rem solid rgb(204, 204= , 204); color: rgb(80, 80, 80); } .search-in_input { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-size: 1rem; } @media (max-width: 1139px) { .search-in_input { font-size: 0.875rem; } } .search-in_select { font-size: 0.9375rem; appearance: menulist; } @media (max-width: 1139px) { .search-in_select { font-size: 0.875rem; } } .search-in_btn { font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0px; height: 2rem; line-heig= ht: 2rem; width: 2rem; text-align: center; position: absolute; top: 0px; ri= ght: 0px; } .search-in_btn, .search-in_btn:focus, .search-in_btn:hover { color: rgb(255= , 255, colo= r: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .slideshowWidget .slideCaption { display: none; } .slideshowWidget .slideNav { display: none; position: relative; float: righ= t; bottom: 3px; right: 3px; rgb(51, 102, 153); } .slideshowWidget .navIndicator { display: block; list-style-type: circle; h= eight: 15px; margin: 5px 0px 0px; padding: 0px; text-align: center; overflo= w: hidden; user-select: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: back= ground-color 1s; } .slideshowWidget .navIndicator span { display: none; } .slideshowWidget.dotNav .navIndicator li { border-radius: 50%; background-c= lip: .slideshowWidget.numNav .navIndicator .active, .slideshowWidget.numNav .nav= Indicator .active:hover { background: rgb(51, 102, 153); color: rgb(255, 25= 5, 255); } .slideshowWidget.numNav background: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(244, 24= 4, 244) 0%, rgb(205, 205, 205) 100%); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 1p= x 2px; z-index: 9998; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; overflow: hidden= ; text-size-adjust: none; } #smartbanner, html.sb-animation { transition: 0.3s; } #smartbanner .sb-container { margin: 0px auto; } #smartbanner .sb-close { position: absolute; left: 5px; top: height: 57px; background: 0% 0% / cover rgba(0, 0, 0,= 0.6); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 1px 3px; } #smartbanner.no-icon .sb-icon { display: none; } #smartbanner .sb-info { none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-und= erline-offset: 2px; display: inline-flex; } #brandingRow a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } body.partner #brandingRow { display: block; background-color: rgb(255, 255,= 255); padding: 7px 26px 7px 30px; color: rgb(0, 125, 188); } body.partner #brandingRow a { color: rgb(0, 125, 188); } body:not(.partner) #brandingRow img { height: 18px; width: auto; } #brandingRowRight { display: inline; float: right; width: auto; padding: 0p= x; margin: 0px; } svg#cp_logo { float: none; height: 54px; width: 54px; margin-left: 0px; mar= gin-top: 0px; } #logosWrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } body:not(.partner) .journal-logos img { max-height: 50px; } body:not(.partner) .journal-logos:nth-of-type(2) img { height: 20px; margin= -top: 6px; max-height: 20px !important; } .ux3 .journal-logos + .journal-logos { margin-left: 16px; } .header__left-side #cpIconLnk { margin-top: 6px; } body:not(.partner) header .journal-logos:nth-of-type(2) { max-width: unset;= } footer hr { display: block; } @media screen and (max-width: 600px) { #brandingRow { font-size: 12px; } .header.base.fixed { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255) !importa= nt; } } @media screen and (max-width: 768px) { #brandingRow { padding: 7px 18px 7px 16px; height: 32px; } svg#cp_logo { margin-right: 10px; } .header.base.fixed { 45%; } @media only screen and (max-width: 768px) { body:not(.partner) .journal-logos + .journal-logos { display: none !impor= tant; } body.partner #brandingRow { padding: 7px 16px; } } @media only ont-weight: 400; } #transformTbl thead td { text-align: right; } #transformTbl td.year { font-weight: bold; } #transformTbl td.num { text-align: right; } #transformTbl thead td { padding-bottom: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(= 80, 80, 80); } #transformTbl tbody tr td { padding-top: 2px; padding-bottom: 2px; } #transformTbl tbody tr:first-of-type td { padding-top: 8px; } #cardTransform a#oaLnk:hover { text-decoration: underline; } #cardTransform svg.infoIcon { vertical-align: text-bottom; margin-left: 2px= ; } #cardTransform svg.infoIcon path { fill: rgb(80, 80, 80); } #cardTransform #infoTooltip, #cardTransform #infoTooltip2, #cardTransform #= infoTooltip3 { display: none; background-color: rgb(0, 125, 188); color: wh= ite; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; position: absolu= te; margin-top: 5px; max-width: 250px; z-index: 150; } #cardTransform svg.infoIcon:hover + #infoTooltip, #cardTransform svg.infoIc= on:hover + #infoTooltip2, #cardTransform svg.infoIcon:hover + #infoTooltip3= { display: block; } #cardTransform #chargeTxt, #cardTransform #chargeTxt2 { color: rgb(80, 80, = 80); font-size: 15px; } .promo.bgWhite #cardTransform { padding: 16px; } .promo.bgWhite .promo-text { padding: 0px 16px 16px; } .promo.bgWhite .promo-header { padding: 10px 0px 0px 16px; } section.brick:nth-child(2n+1) .promo.bgWhite .metric-bar { background-color= : rgb(244, 244, 244); } .collectionImgWrapper { width: 100%; background-color: var(--theme-journal)= ; text-align: center; padding: 10px 0px 5px; } .collectionImgWrapper img { height: 130px; } .collectionImgWrapper a { width: 100%; display: block; } ------MultipartBoundary--Lzp670OJ73yFazw6I0AaWW6T9GBNZjFs7rDChF88mp---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: cid:css-dbff6978-74b0-41b0-9ae9-98ab8f6eec24@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; .button-list { padding: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 1rem; list-style: none; } .button-list a { color: rgb(0, 88, 121); border: 0.0625rem solid rgb(0, 88,= 121); width: 13.5rem; padding: 0.5rem; display: block; transition: 0.2s ea= se-in-out; font-size: 18px; } .button-list li:not(:last-child) { margin-block-end: 1.5rem; } .button-list a:hover { background-color: rgb(80, 80, 80); color: rgb(255, 2= 55, 255); text-decoration: underline; } .button-list a:focus { outline: rgb(186, 186, 186) solid 0.125rem; } .button-list i { font-size: 10px; margin-inline-start: 3px; color: currentc= olor; } border-bottom-style: none; bord= er-bottom-color: currentcolor; } #mastheadBg { background-color: var(--theme-journal); opacity: 0; } #mastheadBgWrapper { background-image: url("/pb-assets/journals/research/ce= ll/home-page/cell-50th-1702580252060.jpg"); background-position: center cen= ter; } header.fixed { border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(235, 235, 235) !important; } #hdrHomeBrand .hdrLogoLarge img { height: 70px; width: auto; margin: auto 1= 6px; max-height: unset; max-width: none; min-height: unset !important; } #hdrHomeBrand .hdrLogoLarge.lines2 img { max-height: 120px; height: 120px; = } #hdrHomeBrand .hdrLogoLarge.lines3 img { max-height: 140px; height: 140px; = } #hdrHomeBrand .hdrLogoLarge img.descender { max-height: 80px; height: 80px;= } #hdrHomeBrand img#society1Img, #hdrHomeBrand img#society2Img { max-width: 1= 20px; max-height: 70px; } @media screen and (max-width: 768px) { #hdrHomeBrand .hdrLogoLarge img { max-width: calc(100% - 20px); margin-le= ft: 10px; margin-right: 10px; height: auto; min-height: 70px !important; } } ------MultipartBoundary--Lzp670OJ73yFazw6I0AaWW6T9GBNZjFs7rDChF88mp---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: cid:css-8fb7bc06-ce80-4448-b686-02406516f380@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; .journal-logos img { height: 50px !important; } .journal-logos:nth-of-type(2) img { max-height: 30px !important; } .journal-logos:nth-of-type(3) img { max-height: 30px !important; } .ux3 .journal-logos + .journal-logos { margin-left: 30px; } .header__wrapper.clearfix .col-xs-6:first-of-type { width: 55%; } .header__wrapper.clearfix .col-xs-6:nth-of-type(2) { width: 45%; } @media screen and (max-width: 1000px) { .ux3 .journal-logos + .journal-logos { display: none; } .header__wrapper.clearfix .col-xs-6:first-of-type { width: 50%; } .header__wrapper.clearfix .col-xs-6:nth-of-type(2) { width: 50%; } } .ux3 .journal-logos:first-of-type { max-width: 500px; } .profile-links { white-space: nowrap; } @media only screen and (min-width: 740px) and (max-width: 1600px) { .journal-logos:nth-of-type(2) img { max-width: 250px !important; } } @media only screen and (min-width: 1024px) and (max-width: 1600px) { .header__wrapper.clearfix .col-xs-6:first-of-type { width: 60% !important= ; } .header__wrapper.clearfix .col-xs-6:nth-of-type(2) { width: 40% !importan= t; } } @media only screen and (max-width: 1240px) { .ux3 .journal-logos + .journal-logos { display: none !important; } } width: 36px; height: 36px; padding= : 7px; } .ytp-drawer-closed .ytp-drawer-close-button { display: none; } .ytp-drawer-open-button { display: none; position: absolute; top: 50%; left= : 0px; width: } .ytp-small-mode .html5-ypc-action-heading { display: none; } .html5-ypc-title { font-size: 20px; } .html5-ypc-thumbnail { float: left; } .html5-ypc-thumbnail img { width: 100px; margin: 0px 10px 10px 0px; } .html5-ypc-thumbnail img.avatar { border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; } .html5-ypc-thumbnail img.landscape { width: 160px; } .ytp-small-mode .html5-ypc-thumbnail img { width: 50px; } .ytp-small-mode .html5-ypc-thumbnail img.landscape { width: 80px; } .ytp-big-mode .html5-ypc-thumbnail img { width: 150px; margin: 0px 15px 18p= x 0px; } .ytp-big-mode .html5-ypc-thumbnail rgb(255, 255, 255); } h3 { margin-top: 6px; margin-bottom: 3px; } .player-unavailable { position: absolute; inset: 0px; padding: 25px; font-s= ize: 13px; background: url("/img/meh7.png") 50% 65% no-repeat; } .player-unavailable .message { text-align: left; margin: 0px -5px 15px; pad= ding: 0px 5px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(136, 136, 136); font-size:= 19px; font-weight: normal; } cid:css-11b732b2-ecb5-4191-aa53-8efbe2c7244a@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; html { overflow: hidden; } body { font: 12px Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0)= ; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); height: 100%; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; p= osition: absolute; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } #player { width: 100%; height: 100%; } h1 { text-align: center; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } h3 { margin-top: 6px; margin-bottom: 3px; } .player-unavailable { position: absolute; inset: 0px; padding: 25px; font-s= ize: 13px; background: url("/img/meh7.png") 50% 65% no-repeat; } .player-unavailable .message { text-align: left; margin: 0px -5px 15px; pad= ding: 0px 5px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(136, 136, 136); font-size:= 19px; font-weight: normal; } .player-unavailable a { color: rgb(22, 122, 198); text-decoration: none; } ------MultipartBoundary--Lzp670OJ73yFazw6I0AaWW6T9GBNZjFs7rDChF88mp---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); height: 100%; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; p= osition: absolute; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } #player { width: 100%; height: 100%; } h1 { text-align: center; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } h3 { margin-top: 6px; margin-bottom: 3px; } .player-unavailable { position: absolute; inset: 0px; padding: 25px; font-s= ize: 13px; background: url("/img/meh7.png") 50% 65% no-repeat; } .player-unavailable .message { text-align: left; margin: 0px -5px 15px; pad= ding: 0px 5px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(136, 136, 136); font-size:= 19px; font-weight: normal; } .player-unavailable a { color: rgb(22, 122, 198); text-decoration: none; } ------MultipartBoundary--Lzp670OJ73yFazw6I0AaWW6T9GBNZjFs7rDChF88mp---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding:
